content: D…Ďp, maa nd…Ďp, pii nd…Ďp, b…ôy nd…Ďp, bu…ôn nd…Ďp, p įam nd…Ďp, p…ôm muuy nd…Ďp, mp…ôl nd…Ďp, mb…ôy nd…Ďp, mbu…ôn nd…Ďp, m…ô Ēp į…ôy.

relationships: eng:Ten, eleven, twelve, thirteen, fourteen, fifteen, sixteen, seventeen, eighteen, nineteen, twenty
